name: Lemon Butter Wafers
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Lemon zest; grind in grinder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of an electric mixer, beat the butter until smooth.
2. Add the sugar and beat until creamy.
3. Beat in the eggs, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
4. Add the flour, beating just until combined.
5. Add the lemon zest and almonds, stirring until well incorporated.
6. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place it in the refrigerator until chilled at least 3 hours.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Butter a nonstick cookie sheet.
9. Using a 1/2 cup measure, spoon out portions of the chilled dough onto the sheet, placing them about 3 inches apart.
10. Bake for about 10 minutes or until the cookies have flattened and are lightly browned around the edges.
11. Cool the cookies on racks.
12. Store in a covered tin.
Variation: Spread 1 tablespoon seedless raspberry jam on the bottom of one cookie, then place the bottom of another cookie on top. This makes a delicious lemon-raspberry cookie sandwich.
